mapper.select: SELECT ep.`project_id` AS id, p.`name` AS project_name, p.`track`, p.`category`, ep.`role`, ep.`status`, p.stage, ep.`created_time` FROM expert_projects AS ep LEFT JOIN projects AS p ON ep.project_id=p.`id` where expert_id =#{expertId}

select id,name,track,category,leader_name,stage,status,created_year from projects
and name like concat('%',#{keyWord},'%')
mapper.delete:
delete from projects where id in
#{id}
